_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalization and characterization of Schwann cell lines derived from NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas.
_publications._context: immortalized cNF cell lines through transduction with wild-type human telomerase reverse transcriptase (hTERT) and murine cyclin-dependent kinase 4 (mCdk4) genes | Immortalized cutaneous neurofibroma Schwann cell lines (icNF 97.2a, icNF 97.2b, and icNF 98.4d) were obtained from Dr. Margaret Wallace

_publications._publicationTitle: snRNA-seq of human cutaneous neurofibromas before and after selumetinib treatment implicates role of altered Schwann cell states, inter-cellular signaling, and extracellular matrix in treatment response.
